pi_items.verified_value: synthetic dataset constructed by Andy Field for his statistics textbooks
pi_items.source: Web search: Andy Field Viagra dataset educational synthetic

privileged_info_summary: The Viagra.csv dataset contains 30 data rows with columns 'dose' (values 1, 2, 3), 'libido', and 'partnerLibido'. Contrary to the task description claiming it is a real pharmacological study, this dataset is synthetic and was constructed by Andy Field for educational purposes in his statistics textbooks.
